results.title: My Honest Flodesk Review: Pros + Cons for Growing Your List
results.content:
However, if you want to get creative beyond the bounds of the native Flodesk layout blocks, your options are somewhat limited.

If you’re someone who cares about complete customization of your email’s look, you may want to play around with Flodesk on the free version before committing.

## Is Flodesk worth it?

In my opinion, Flodesk is absolutely worth it! Despite some of the complaints about Flodesk, the other features and benefits totally make up for it. Plus, they’re always adding new things!

No platform is without its limitations, you just have to find the one that works best for you. And from $19/month for your entire first year, Flodesk is a savvy and worthwhile investment for your business! [...] For the longest time, you would hear the same criticisms of Flodesk — there aren’t any analytics, you can’t automate subscriber tagging, it’s just for looks, etc.

After five years on the platform, I can proudly say that isn’t the case anymore.

I firmly believe that there aren’t any truly perfect, all-inclusive business tools. You have to stick with what works best for you and trust that with time, the platform will develop.

I never thought Flodesk would add the ability to auto-tag subscribers for advanced segmentation. But last year, 2024, they introduced link actions to do just that.

They also added analytics within the platform, the ability to view your Flodesk workflows without pausing them, and so many other often requested features. [...] Flodesk combines a clean, user-friendly interface with beautiful design to create an email platform that’s as simple to use as it is aesthetically pleasing.

I’ll talk more about the design in a sec, because I know that’s easy to ignore.

Maybe you’re thinking, “Psh, I don’t care about pretty emails, I just need something that works.”

Fair! Flodesk works. And even better, it’s easy to get set up and running on Flodesk with simple, clear functions and navigations. You don’t have to be an email marketing expert to use Flodesk.

That’s why I think Flodesk is such a good email marketing platform for beginners. Even though there might be cheaper or free platforms out there, Flodesk offers an excellent place to learn how to set up workflows, sequences, segmentation, and more.

results.title: After Less Than A Year: Why I Switched Back to Flodesk
results.content:
### Design Limitations

One of the biggest issues I faced with ConvertKit was the lack of design flexibility. As an artist, visual communication is everything, and my emails need to reflect the aesthetics of my brand. Unfortunately, ConvertKit's templates felt insanely outdated. The customization options were limited, and trying to create emails that felt aligned with my brand was like driving a Ferrari with a hand break pressed the entire time. Frustrating! [...] Heads up, friend…

This post contains some affiliate links, which means if you sign up or make a purchase through one of my links (like this one), I might earn a small commission—at no extra cost to you, of course! While I am being compensated for writing this, all opinions and recommendations are 100% my own. I genuinely use and love Flodesk for my email marketing and will recommend it to almost all of my artist clients! Your support helps keep the creative vibes flowing, so thank you!

## The Frustration with ConvertKit: Why It Didn’t Work for Me [...] At first, ConvertKit seemed like the solution to all my business needs. My art business had grown to the point where I needed more advanced automation, better segmentation, and the ability to manage complex workflows with ease. ConvertKit promised all of that, and for a while, it did deliver. But as time went on, I began to notice a series of frustrations that eventually made the platform more of a burden than a help.

### Design Limitations
